briefdescription.para: This function handles setting of DFU state.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is a value of the DFU state to be set

simplesect.para:
- XST_SUCCESS if the function is successful.
XST_FAILURE if an Error occurred.

briefdescription.para: This function updates the current state while downloading a file.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is a pointer of the DFU status

briefdescription.para: This function handles getting of DFU status.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is the pointer of the DFU status
is a pointer to DFU instance of the controller
is the pointer of the DFU status

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if the function is successful.

briefdescription.para: This function handles USB disconnect, called from driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller

briefdescription.para: This function handles USB reset, called from driver.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller

briefdescription.para: This function handles set interface request.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to Usb_DevData instance of the controller
is a pointer to setup token of control transfer

briefdescription.para: This function is class request handler for composite device Setup packet received is for Class request(not a Standard Device request)

detaileddescription.para:
InstancePtr
is pointer to Usb_DevData instance.
SetupData
is pointer to SetupPacket received.
None
None. This function is class request handler for composite device Setup packet received is for Class request(not a Standard Device request)

parameterdescription.para: is the setup packet received from Host.

briefdescription.para: This file contains definitions used in the AUDIO-DFU composite class code.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.0 rb 22/02/18 First release
